title: Oil India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Oil India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Oil India South Asia Partners in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Oil India South Asia Partners:
Oil India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oil India South Asia Partners!
